features.name: Discover durable insights
features.outcome: Product teams can find current market and customer insights without reconstructing source history.
highlights: Separates current findings from stale context

features.name: Capture evidence safely
features.outcome: Product teams can preserve customer signals as portable evidence without exposing private raw material.

features.name: Shape product strategy
features.outcome: Product leaders can turn evidence into explicit priorities and non-goals that constrain later decisions.
highlights: Keeps strategic tokens stable across edits

features.name: Rank evidence-backed ideas
features.outcome: Product teams can compare candidate ideas consistently and see strategy conflicts before saving them.
highlights: Shows unknown priorities and non-goal conflicts

features.name: Scope approved proposals
features.outcome: Product teams can convert validated ideas into approved execution contracts with explicit boundaries.
highlights: Binds approval to exact proposal bytes

features.name: Deliver verified work
features.outcome: Engineering teams can implement and release approved scope through resumable evidence-bound gates.
highlights: Routes work by risk and artifact state
Verifies effects before replay or completion

features.name: Review decision quality
features.outcome: Teams can identify evidence-bound implementation and artifact defects without review-count theater.
highlights: Separates blocking findings from advisory debt

features.name: Retain workflow learnings
features.outcome: Teams can preserve reusable process lessons while keeping product decisions in their source artifacts.
highlights: Separates process memory from product truth
Caps retained context to durable lessons
